form.formComment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last preparation 9th of 11 at Bordertown 3yo+ Mdn-Hcp on December 14 over 1300m, 15 len behind French Love with 54kg at $12. First up last campaign second last of 8 at Hawkesbury 3yo Mdn on March 18 2025 over 1300m, 7 len behind Super Nui with 59kg at $31. Finished fifth in a Morphettville Parks trial over 1000m on April 2. Might be better off following this run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in under pressure over the final 200m of the event.

form.formComment: Facing the starter for the first time. Three-year-old gelding by Astern out of Mystic Spirit. At the most recent trial was out of the placings over 1000m at Strathalbyn March 26. Profiles nicely and is worth keeping safe.
